methods.name: Send
methods.description: Arm the transmitter after pre-loading frame bytes into ETH_TX_DATA (offset 6). DR1 = dataGT (reserved for future DMA path, ignored in MMIO model); DR2 = byte count. Returns DR1 = byteLen.
inputs: DR1: dataGT — reserved for future DMA path; ignored in MMIO model
DR2: byteLen — byte count of frame pre-loaded in TX FIFO (1–1518)
comments: LOAD CR7, CR6, #0   — EthernetDevice GT from c-list slot 0 → CR7
DWRITE DR2, CR7, #2 — byteLen → ETH_TX_LEN (commits queued bytes, starts TX)

methods.name: Receive
methods.description: Poll for a pending frame (non-blocking). Returns DR1 = 0 if no frame is waiting, or DR1 = N (byte count) when a frame is ready. Drain the frame with N sequential DREAD CR7,#7 reads from ETH_RX_DATA before calling Receive() again.
outputs: DR1: 0 = no frame waiting; N = byte count of pending frame (drain via ETH_RX_DATA reads)
comments: LOAD CR7, CR6, #0  — EthernetDevice GT from c-list slot 0 → CR7
DREAD DR1, CR7, #3 — ETH_RX_LEN → DR1 (0 = no frame, N = byte count)

methods.name: Connect
methods.description: Register a UDP session endpoint. DR1 = packed IPv4 address (network byte order); DR2 = port number. Returns DR1 = 0 on success, -1 on fault.
inputs: DR1: packed IPv4 address in network byte order (e.g. 0xC0A80001 = 192.168.0.1)
comments: LOAD CR7, CR6, #0   — EthernetDevice GT from c-list slot 0 → CR7

methods.name: Status
methods.description: Query hardware link state. Returns DR1 = 0 (link down), 1 (link up), or 2 (auto-negotiating).
outputs: DR1: 0 = link down, 1 = link up, 2 = negotiating
comments: LOAD CR7, CR6, #0  — EthernetDevice GT from c-list slot 0 → CR7
DREAD DR1, CR7, #1 — ETH_STATUS direct 3-state value → DR1
